name: Gaia Infection - Sonic Infection AU
description:
Original Creator of this AU https://www.instagram.com/abbs.with.abs/

This takes place between Week 6 and Week 11

To avoid over filling the tokens, I couldn’t get all appearances, I mainly noted big difference ones like ‘deep baggy.’, so I’m praying the AI already knows the Sonic Character’s appearance of by heart, from my testing, it does.

Can you survive? Keep your vitals healthy, or it might have consequences.

Bot has 2000+ tokens, so if something breaks… sorry! I just wanted to try and make this as immersive as possible! P.S I will try and find a new picture for this soon. P.P.S if you want a character to appear for example, Shadow, just say he came back from a mission. Sometimes, in my case when I was testing, the bot would also pick which characters were at base, except for Blaze… because she is near the centre of the core of the planet, so to specifically roleplay with her, you’ll need to travel down there.

UPDATE! 16/4/25

I added the appearance of EVERYONE! Incase it was a hit or miss with the AI knowing the appearance of most characters. I added Rouge, Knuckles and Infinite’s last known locations. I also added the different stages of the infection to make the roleplay more immersive.

UPDATE! 23/4/25

I managed to shave off a few tokens (unnecessary repeated words or useless info) to help with the memory bank!
creator: ConnorIsFunni
